completion_scope: database port, transaction-local context orchestration, repository guards, and deterministic reused-client integration tests; live PostgreSQL execution is reserved for the foundation gate and is not claimed

ordered_tdd_result.red_reason: MODULE_NOT_FOUND for apps/api/src/db/context.js before the T050 database modules existed
ordered_tdd_result.green_result: 8 request-context tests passed in the clean HCP-01-approved Node.js 24.18.0 rerun; T047-T050 total 32

acceptance_evidence.boundary_validation: pass: exact request-context keys, UUIDv7 IDs, principal types, authentication strength, and correlation are revalidated before pool lease
acceptance_evidence.runtime_role: pass: every lease attests exact platform_api identity, NOSUPERUSER, NOBYPASSRLS, NOINHERIT, and no platform schema/database/object ownership
acceptance_evidence.transaction_local_context: pass: approved platform_private.set_request_context is invoked inside BEGIN with parameters and database-observed getters must exactly match before callback capability is issued
acceptance_evidence.pool_leakage: pass: the same fake pooled client is reused across tenant A, commit, tenant B, rollback, and reuse; local state is absent outside each transaction
acceptance_evidence.capability_lifetime: pass: verified transaction query capability rejects all use after callback completion
acceptance_evidence.repository_scope: pass: tenant rows are checked against verified tenant and optional environment before return; malformed or cross-scope rows fail opaquely
acceptance_evidence.expected_version: pass: exact matches continue and mismatches throw an opaque non-enumerable repository error

validation.supported_runtime: pass: exact restored Node.js 24.18.0 binary and clean HCP-01-approved rerun
validation.authority: pass: 2 artifacts; owner 7 Finger Studios; classification Internal; PF-033
validation.root_verifier: pass: 10 legacy tests, 9 compatibility tests, 8 traceability requirements
